since_last: 32% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.05% · BTC +0.05% · Gold -0.40% · Nasdaq100 -0.74%. 32% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.54%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.54%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -12.95%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.77%, POWL +3.85%, ORCL +3.77%, AAPL +3.76%, GOOGL +3.13%. Laggards: DELL -12.95%, SKHY -10.29%, MU -8.57%, AMBA -7.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.84% at $134.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.84% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
